steps.title: Cancel the common factor
steps.content:
Every term has a factor of $58$, so divide the entire equation by $58$.
$$
\frac{1}{p}=\frac{1}{q}-\frac{1}{r}-\frac{1}{s}
$$

steps.title: Combine and reciprocate
steps.content: Use common denominator $prs$, then take the reciprocal. $$ \frac{1}{q}=\frac{rs+ps+pr}{prs} $$ $$ q=\frac{prs}{pr+ps+rs} $$ The answer is A.
